title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: European regulators are shifting from policy design to active enforcement across 27 member states simultaneously. The EU's MiCA regime becomes fully operational July 1 with over 30 technical standards taking effect, while AMLA launches direct supervision of high-risk CASPs in Q3. UK's FCA opens its authorization gateway September 2026, creating parallel compliance deadlines for firms operating across both jurisdictions.
